title: Iran-Iraq: A Comparison of Two War-Weary Economies (An Intelligence Assessment)
source_org: Central Intelligence Agency (CIA), Directorate of Intelligence, Office of Near Eastern and South Asian Analysis (NESA)
license_terms: US government work, public domain; declassified in part, sanitized copy
notes: CREST General CIA Records. NESA 88-10067, November 1988. Declassified in Part - Sanitized Copy Approved for Release 2012/07/30. Original Classification: Secret. Document Page Count: 27. Assesses comparative war-time economic damage/resilience of Iran vs Iraq: Iran's opposition to foreign borrowing forced cuts to civilian spending and deterioration of economic infrastructure including the oil sector, contrasted with Iraq's accumulation of foreign debt while maintaining more of its civilian economy.
